name: Peach Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cornstarch with 1/2 cup milk until smooth.
2. Gradually add the additional 1 1/2 cups of milk, stirring constantly to avoid lumps, and cook over very low heat until thick and smooth.
3. In a separate bowl, blend sugar, eggs, salt, and evaporated milk using an electric mixer.
4. Add the hot cornstarch mixture to the egg mixture and beat well.
5. Stir in the whipping cream, remaining 2 cups of milk, crushed peaches, vanilla, and almond extract.
6. Pour the mixture into a gallon-sized electric or hand-crank freezer bowl.
7. Churn and freeze according to the manufacturer's directions until firm.
8. Carefully remove the paddle from the ice cream container.
9. Seal the container well.
10. Fill the ice cream freezer with crushed ice and ice cream salt, covering the freezer tightly.
11. Set aside several hours for the ice cream to season, or spoon it into another chilled container and store in the home freezer to season.
Makes about 1 gallon
